nasb.text: behold, I am going to arouse them from the place where you have sold them, and return your recompense on your head.

esv.text: Behold, I will stir them up from the place to which you have sold them, and I will return your payment on your own head.

cnv.text: 看哪！我要激動他們離開被你們賣到的地方，我也要使報應歸到你們的頭上。

ccb.text: 然而，他们被卖到哪里，我要从哪里把他们带回来，并要使你们得到报应，
